document.title: Pre Atlas — System Debrief
document.purpose: Comprehensive reference for a project manager or system orchestrator to understand, operate, and extend the Pre Atlas system

executive_summary.description: Pre Atlas is a federated monorepo containing five interconnected projects that form a personal behavioral governance and productivity system. It analyzes 1,397 conversations (93,898 messages) exported from ChatGPT, detects unresolved cognitive loops, computes a daily operational mode, and enforces behavioral constraints through progressive UI lockouts. All state changes are recorded as append-only, hash-chained deltas. The system runs entirely on the local machine with no cloud dependencies.

delta_fabric.purpose: Persistent state synchronization layer. Append-only delta log and entity store with hash chains.

files.entities.json: Entity store — entity_id, entity_type, created_at, current_version, current_hash, is_archived
files.deltas.json: Delta operation log — delta_id, entity_id, timestamp, author, patch (JSON Patch), prev_hash, new_hash

delta_fabric.design: Every change is a delta with a hash chain linking to previous state. Tamper-evident. State reconstruction by folding deltas in order.
delta_fabric.known_issue: 10 hash chain fork points from concurrent daemon writes without file lock. No data loss but state divergence possible. Fix needed: add file lock to deltas.json writes.

delta_kernel.purpose: Deterministic OS engine. Routing, mode governance, REST API, sync protocol, work admission, timeline logging.
design_principles: No overwrites — every state change is a delta
No uncontrolled AI execution — all actions pass through confirmation gates
Deterministic routing — mode computation is pure lookup table, no heuristics or probabilities
Hash-chain verification — all deltas linked cryptographically

mode_system.description: Exactly one active mode at all times. Routing determined by 5 signals bucketed into LOW/OK/HIGH.

modes.allowed: Finish tasks, reply messages, clean queues

governance_daemon.description: Autonomous daemon running scheduled jobs alongside API server

jobs.description: Streak reset if no BUILD closure that day
Autonomous mode governance based on closure ratio

work_admission_control.description: All work (human and AI) passes through universal work controller

primitives.purpose: Ask permission to start a job. Checks mode, capacity (max 1 concurrent, queue depth 5), dependencies.
Report job completion with optional AI metrics (tokens_used, cost_usd).
Query current work state, active jobs, queue.

enforcement_ladder.behavior: Disable Create / New Project / Add Task actions
Hard lock build surfaces until loop closed/archived

api_endpoints.description: Request permission to start a job
All events for a specific day

modules.name: Daily Cockpit
modules.purpose: Main UI — mode, signals, actions, tasks, drafts, leverage moves

modules.name: Preparation Engine
modules.purpose: Background workers that prepare (never execute) drafts and actions. 12 templates, 5 workers, idempotent by fingerprint.

modules.name: Matryoshka Dictionary
modules.purpose: Template compression — message templates with slot parameters

modules.name: UI Surface Streaming
modules.purpose: Remote UI rendering with delta patches

modules.name: Camera Tile Streaming
modules.purpose: Video scene composition with baseline + delta extraction

cognitive_sensor.purpose: Behavioral governance through conversation analysis. Loop detection, idea mining, self-analysis profiles, governor briefs.

loop_detection.critical_gap: loops.py does NOT read loop_decisions table or closures.json. It regenerates from scratch on every run. Closed loops reappear. The open loop count and closure ratio use different data paths — loops_latest.json comes from loops.py (ignores decisions), closure ratio comes from completion_stats.py (reads loop_decisions).

agents.method: Hierarchical clustering + status detection + alignment scoring
Priority: freq 20% + recency 20% + alignment 25% + feasibility 15% + compounding 20%
Renders tables, hierarchy trees, timelines, recommendations

idea_intelligence_pipeline.schema_validation: Agents 1-4 call require_valid() before writing JSON, enforcing ExcavatedIdeas.v1.json or IdeaRegistry.v1.json contracts

agents.method: Semantic signatures + keyword signals for domain/outcome/emotion/intensity
30-question analysis across 6 layers (identity, power, execution, decisions, cognition, opportunity)
Extracts power dynamics content, clusters into 12 chapter themes, 2,070 passages

daily.content: Mode assessment, lane status, top moves, binary decisions, guardrails, early warning signs

weekly.content: Weekly audit, idea pipeline status, 3-5 strategic decisions

level_2.name: AI-for-itself
level_2.description: Ingest, classify, maintain backlog, park new ideas — no human approval needed. All 17 agent scripts.

level_1.name: AI-for-you
level_1.description: Generate briefs with binary decisions — human approves or rejects. Governor scripts only.

proper_method: Run python resurfacer.py to surface the top unresolved loop (appends to RESURFACER_LOG.md)
Run python decide.py — reads most recently resurfaced loop, prompts for CLOSE/CONTINUE/ARCHIVE
Decision written to loop_decisions table in results.db
Run python atlas_cli.py daily to refresh pipeline — completion_stats.py recalculates closure ratio
closure_mechanism.critical_note: Due to loops.py gap, the loop will still appear in loops_latest.json even after being decided on. Closure ratio improves (via completion_stats.py) but open loop count does not decrease.

self_analysis_profiles.contents: Core wounds (Invalidation, Powerlessness), attachment style (dismissive-avoidant), values, defense mechanisms
Emotional landscape — agency 26%, connection 97% negativity, 61.8% negative emotion ratio
60% of conversations exceed 2,000 words, 51% loop without resolution
5-step stuck loop: INTEND (9,643) → OBSTACLE (11,711) → JUSTIFY (13,233) → DISMISS (2,506) → RESET (4,324)
Cognitive fallacies (All-or-Nothing at 39%), blindspots, growth opportunities
Phrase frequency — 'i feel like' (6,209x), 'i dont know' (2,042x), 'and then i' (2,518x)
What knocks you off course — phone (1,509 mentions), people, emotional spirals

commands.description: Full daily loop: ingest + analyze + backlog + daily brief
Full weekly loop: daily + audit + weekly packet
Full idea intelligence pipeline + conversation classifier
Generate governor briefs from current state (no refresh)
Show config (North Star, lanes, moratorium) and file freshness

ports.service: Static file server for HTML interfaces

webos_333.purpose: Standalone browser-based OS simulator. No connection to main system.

uasc_m2m.purpose: Standalone research. Ultra-Compressed Symbolic Encoding for Machine-to-Machine Communication. Encodes workflows into single Chinese-inspired glyphs using stroke patterns as logical operations.
uasc_m2m.dependencies: Python 3.x stdlib only. No connection to main system.

shared_contracts.enforcement: All exports call require_valid() from validate.py before writing

schemas.purpose: UI consumption payload with mode, loops, directive

phase_history.name: Genesis
phase_history.summary: Cognitive-sensor from scratch: results.db, loop detection, routing, dashboard, CycleBoard, refresh pipeline

phase_history.name: Bridge
phase_history.summary: JSON Schema contracts, daily projection artifact, C→D bridge via POST /api/ingest/cognitive, 4-step pipeline

phase_history.name: Autonomy
phase_history.summary: Governance daemon with scheduled jobs, unified state endpoint, day boundary tracking

phase_history.name: Enforcement
phase_history.summary: Progressive enforcement ladder (warn → acknowledge → disable → hard lock), violation logging, emergency overrides

phase_history.name: Live Push
phase_history.summary: WebSocket push instead of polling. Deferred in favor of 5B — closure mechanics prioritized.

phase_history.name: Closure Mechanics
phase_history.summary: Closure as atomic state event, streak tracking, automatic mode transitions, physical loop removal, Law Genesis Layer. Mode transition rules: >= 80% → SCALE, >= 60% → BUILD, >= 40% → MAINTENANCE, < 40% → CLOSURE.

phase_history.name: Work Admission Control
phase_history.summary: Universal work controller for humans + AI, capacity bounds, dependency tracking, job queue. Design principle: 'First you make law apply to machines. Then machines become safe to automate.'

phase_history.name: Ambient Gate
phase_history.summary: Gate client auto-starts kernel, CLI interface, control panel UI. Law is never optional.

phase_history.name: Timeline Layer
phase_history.summary: Append-only event log, temporal visibility, intent vs. reality gap tracking. Two timelines: Calendar A (intent/plan) and Calendar B (what actually happened).

phase_history.name: Agent Pipeline
phase_history.summary: 17 agent scripts formalized. Idea intelligence pipeline (5 agents). Behavioral analysis pipeline (3 agents). Governor system (daily + weekly). Dead code audit: 12 scripts archived.

north_star.weekly: Ship 1 asset (doc, tool, GPT, chapter, client deliverable)
north_star.monthly: Generate revenue from AI consulting or products
north_star.guard: Block new ideas unless current lane is shipped or archived

active_lanes.name: Power Dynamics Book + Companion GPT
active_lanes.ship_criteria: Published on Kindle/Gumroad with companion GPT live
active_lanes.existing_material: 2,070 passages across 12 chapters in book_raw_material.json, BOOK_OUTLINE.md generated

active_lanes.name: AI Automation Consulting (First Client)
active_lanes.existing_material: None — no service offering, pricing, or outreach artifacts exist

known_issues.description: Does not read loop_decisions table or closures.json. Closed loops reappear on next pipeline run. Open loop count and closure ratio use different data paths.
10 fork points from concurrent daemon writes without file lock. No data loss but state divergence possible.
Created with headers only, never populated.
UI still polls unified endpoint. Real-time push not implemented.
Matryoshka Dictionary, Vector Discovery, AI Design, Off-Grid Nodes, Audio Streaming specified but not implemented beyond types.
No integration with main system. Consume repo space without contributing to governance.

proper_loop_closure: python resurfacer.py — surfaces top unresolved loop, appends to RESURFACER_LOG.md
python decide.py — prompts for CLOSE / CONTINUE / ARCHIVE, writes to loop_decisions table
python atlas_cli.py daily — refreshes pipeline, completion_stats.py recalculates closure ratio
NOTE: Loop will still appear in loops_latest.json due to loops.py gap. Ratio improves but count does not.

interfaces.name: Control Panel
interfaces.function: Live governor state, mode, capacity, active jobs

interfaces.name: Timeline Viewer
interfaces.function: Event replay, intent vs. reality gap

interfaces.name: Analytics Dashboard
interfaces.function: State history, loop trends, completion metrics

interfaces.name: Master Control
interfaces.function: Mode display, risk assessment, action buttons

interfaces.name: CycleBoard
interfaces.function: Planning tool with governance overlay and UI lockouts

backup.recovery: python refresh.py regenerates all derived files

security.network: NO external network. NO cloud services. NO authentication.
security.boundary: All data stays within repo boundary. Runs entirely on local machine.
